untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires identification of downward trend line touching points multiple times and detection of nested pattern formation. These require explicit trendline detection, pattern shape analysis, and multi-timeframe pattern recognition which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal depends on visual pattern detection (trend line geometry) rather than quantitative indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot point crossover as a proxy for trend line breakout and volume confirmation for breakout strength. However, the core BARR pattern detection (downward trend line with multiple touches, formation of larger nested pattern) cannot be accurately represented with available quantitative indicators. This signal would require custom trendline and pattern recognition algorithms.
